mapper.sql: CASE r.reason_type WHEN 'harassment' THEN 'high' WHEN 'copyright' THEN 'high' WHEN 'inappropriate' THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END
CASE r.reason_type WHEN 'harassment' THEN 1 WHEN 'copyright' THEN 1 WHEN 'inappropriate' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT r.id, r.status, r.target_type AS targetType, r.reason_type AS reasonType, r.admin_remark AS adminRemark, ur.nickname AS reporterName, au.nickname AS adminName, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.processed_at AS processedAt, CASE r.target_type WHEN 'article' THEN a.title WHEN 'comment' THEN CONCAT('评论: ', LEFT(c.content, 50)) WHEN 'user' THEN CONCAT('用户: ', tu.nickname) ELSE '未知' END AS targetTitle FROM report r LEFT JOIN user ur ON r.reporter_id = ur.id LEFT JOIN user tu ON r.target_user_id = tu.id LEFT JOIN user au ON r.admin_id = au.id LEFT JOIN article a ON r.target_type = 'article' AND r.target_id = a.id LEFT JOIN comment c ON r.target_type = 'comment' AND r.target_id = c.id WHERE r.status IN ('resolved', 'rejected') AND r.processed_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.processed_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
